name_en: OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 The handsome best-selling oversized airport bag is here 🆕. This bag is truly born for travel. The bag body is very light, a perfect travel companion 🚩🚩🚩. Buy one bag and everyone can use it, really too practical!! The bigger the airport bag, the cooler it looks. This supermodel large patent grainy leather rhombus pattern, paired with eye-catching vintage hardware embellishing the Cambon square plaque. Wear it and you have a stunning airport look. Size 43cm
